Market Intelligence Brief
Generated 16:02 ET
Institutional dispersion hedge floods in as 13F reversals clash with positive gamma environment
KEY TAKEAWAYS
  • 1. Massive index puts vs single-name calls divergence (1.32 vs 0.76) signals institutional dispersion hedging into earnings season
  • 2. Millennium's 398% AMZN reversal and Druckenmiller's full META exit create actionable positioning conflicts with today's mega-cap call blocks
  • 3. Seven names in backwardation ahead of GS/JPM/NFLX earnings create elevated near-term volatility despite positive dealer gamma
NARRATIVE — dispersion hedge into earnings

The most striking signal today is the extreme divergence between index put-heavy flow (P/C 1.32) and single-name call-heavy flow (P/C 0.76) — a textbook institutional dispersion hedge ahead of earnings season. This 55-point flow-regime divergence comes as dealer positioning sits at strongly positive gamma (+$9.5B SPY, +$5.3B QQQ), creating a structural dampening effect that should contain directional moves even as institutions hedge tail risk. Mega-cap call blocks tell a different story than recent 13F reversals, with AMZN's 36,000 Jun 220C block ($25.50) directly contradicting Millennium's massive Q4 reversal from selling to adding 398%. Similarly, today's MSFT 20,000 Jun 480C block conflicts with Millennium's late-but-aggressive 135% add, suggesting either profit-taking or overlay positioning. The NFLX 16,000 Jun 100C block ahead of Apr 16 earnings aligns with technical strength (RSI 70+) but occurs in a backwardated vol environment pricing elevated near-term risk. Seven names trading in backwardation — including GS and NFLX with earnings this week — signal elevated near-term fear despite the broader positive gamma regime. The vol divergence flags on META (VOL HIGH/SKEW FLAT) and EWZ/DASH (RICH VOL/CALL HEAVY) create cross-signal tension that typically resolves through either volatility compression or directional breakouts, with Monthly OpEx in four days adding urgency to positioning decisions.

Layer 1: Sentiment +42Layer 2: GEX +$9.5B positiveLayer 3: P/C divergence 1.32/0.76Layer 4: 7 names backwardatedLayer 7: 13F reversals AMZN/META

GREEK PRESSURE KEY

−$M = dealer sells to re-hedge
